Old tree with small apples, ripe in late August. Taste similar to a gala or Jonathan apple. Most low hanging branches are bare; if you want to pick, you'll need a ladder or picker. Access: Public.

Old tree with low yield and many dead branches, but delightful, sweet and flavorful fruit. Apples are greeny-yellow, with medium-soft flesh. Need to bring a picker to access most fruit as the lower branches are dead. Access: Public.
